message:
Initialize workspace structure and dependency graph

Establish the UltraSearch cargo workspace with 13 crates mapped to the architectural layers
defined in PLAN §1.2:

## Workspace layout (ultrasearch/Cargo.toml)
- Core: core-types, core-serialization
- NTFS/System: ntfs-watcher, scheduler
- Indexing: meta-index, content-index, semantic-index, content-extractor
- IPC/Service: ipc, service, index-worker
- UI: ui, cli

## Key dependency selections

### NTFS + Windows primitives
- windows 0.58 + windows-sys 0.59: Comprehensive Win32 API coverage for NTFS MFT/USN journal, service management, COM (IFilter), and system info
- usn-journal-rs (git): Direct MFT enumeration and journal tailing per §3
- sysinfo 0.30: Cross-platform CPU/disk/memory sampling for scheduler idle detection §7.2

### Search + indexing
- tantivy 0.22: Full-text search engine with mmap, lz4 compression (§4, §5)
  - Note: Targeting 0.24 once stabilized for CompactDoc memory optimizations
- fst 0.4: Memory-mapped finite state transducer for ultra-fast prefix lookups §4.4
- memmap2 0.9: Zero-copy file mapping for rkyv state and FST accelerators §4.3

### Content extraction
- extractous (git): Rust-based Apache Tika extraction (10-18x faster, 11x lower memory) §6.2
- reqwest 0.12 (rustls-tls): Component auto-installation downloads §6.5
- image 0.25: PNG/JPEG conversion for document previews §9.4

### Async + concurrency
- tokio 1.40: Multi-threaded runtime for service IPC server §8.1
- rayon 1.10: Work-stealing parallelism for Tantivy indexing §5.3
- crossbeam-channel 0.5: Lock-free MPSC for scheduler job queues §7.3
- parking_lot 0.12: Faster mutexes than std for hot paths

### Serialization + config
- rkyv 0.7: Zero-copy archiving for volume state snapshots §2.3
- bincode 1.3: Compact IPC message framing §8.3
- serde 1.0 + serde_json/yaml/toml: Config loading (dotenvy for .env) §10.1

### UI stack (GPUI)
- gpui (zed git): GPU-accelerated declarative UI framework §9
- gpui-component (zed git): Virtualized table + list components for results §9.2

### Data structures + utilities
- slotmap 1.0: Stable handles for in-memory metadata cache §3.4
- lru 0.12: LRU path cache (cap ~50k entries) §3.4
- ahash 0.8: Faster than SipHash for non-cryptographic hashing
- smallvec 1.13: Stack-allocated vectors for hot paths
- bumpalo 3.16: Arena allocator for worker process extraction batches

## Build profiles
- dev: opt-level=1 for reasonable debug perf in indexing code
- release: LTO thin, codegen-units=1 for maximum throughput
- release-service: opt-level="z" to minimize service footprint §1.1
- release-worker: opt-level=3 for extraction throughput §6.6

## Lints
- Forbid unsafe_code at workspace level (safety-first policy)
- Enable clippy::all, pedantic, nursery (high code quality bar)
- Allow too_many_arguments, module_name_repetitions (pragmatic overrides)

This commit establishes the dependency baseline. No code yet; all crates are stubs.

Next: Core type system and config infrastructure (c00.2.x)

Related: PLAN §0 (design philosophy), §1.2 (workspace layout), AGENTS.md (cargo check/clippy gates)

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,146 @@
+[workspace]
+resolver = "2"
+members = [
+    "crates/core-types",
+    "crates/core-serialization",
+    "crates/ntfs-watcher",
+    "crates/meta-index",
+    "crates/content-index",
+    "crates/content-extractor",
+    "crates/scheduler",
+    "crates/ipc",
+    "crates/semantic-index",
+    "crates/service",
+    "crates/index-worker",
+    "crates/ui",
+    "crates/cli",
+]
+
+[workspace.package]
+edition = "2024"
+rust-version = "1.84"
+version = "0.1.0"
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeffrey.emanuel@gmail.com>"]
+repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
+homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
+
+[workspace.dependencies]
+# --- Core ecosystem ---
+anyhow = "1.0"
+thiserror = "1.0"
+serde = { version = "1.0", features = ["derive"] }
+serde_json = "1.0"
+serde_yaml = "0.9"
+toml = "0.8"
+bincode = "1.3"
+rkyv = { version = "0.7", features = ["std", "validation"] }
+dotenvy = "0.15"
+once_cell = "1.19"
+
+# --- Concurrency & async ---
+tokio = { version = "1.40", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "net", "fs", "io-util", "time", "signal"] }
+rayon = "1.10"
+crossbeam-channel = "0.5"
+parking_lot = "0.12"
+
+# --- NTFS / Windows / system info ---
+windows = { version = "0.58", features = [
+    "Win32_Foundation",
+    "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
+    "Win32_System_Console",
+    "Win32_System_Threading",
+    "Win32_System_Diagnostics_ToolHelp",
+    "Win32_System_Diagnostics_Debug",
+    "Win32_System_Ioctl",
+    "Win32_System_IO",
+    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
+    "Win32_System_Com",
+    "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging",
+    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
+] }
+windows-sys = { version = "0.59", features = [
+    "Win32_Foundation",
+    "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
+    "Win32_System_Threading",
+    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
+    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
+] }
+sysinfo = { version = "0.30", default-features = false, features = ["system", "process", "disk"] }
+
+# NTFS / USN journal crate placeholder; adjust when vendored.
+usn-journal-rs = { git = "https://github.com/example/usn-journal-rs.git", branch = "main" }
+
+# --- Search engine / index ---
+tantivy = { version = "0.22", features = ["mmap", "lz4-compression"] }
+fst = "0.4"
+memmap2 = "0.9"
+
+# --- Content extraction / OCR / HTTP ---
+extractous = { git = "https://github.com/extractous/extractous.git", branch = "main" }
+reqwest = { version = "0.12", default-features = false, features = ["rustls-tls", "stream"] }
+image = { version = "0.25", default-features = false, features = ["png", "jpeg"] }
+
+# --- IPC / serialization ---
+uuid = { version = "1.10", features = ["v4"] }
+
+# --- Logging / tracing ---
+tracing = "0.1"
+tracing-subscriber = { version = "0.3", features = ["env-filter", "fmt"] }
+
+# --- Data structures / utilities ---
+smallvec = "1.13"
+ahash = "0.8"
+indexmap = { version = "2.6", features = ["serde"] }
+lru = "0.12"
+slotmap = "1.0"
+bumpalo = "3.16"
+
+# --- CLI / UX for tools ---
+clap = { version = "4.5", features = ["derive", "env"] }
+console = "0.15"
+indicatif = "0.17"
+
+# --- UI stack (GPUI) ---
+gpui = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui" }
+gpui-component = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui-component" }
+
+# --- Testing / dev ---
+proptest = "1.5"
+criterion = { version = "0.5", default-features = false, features = ["html_reports"] }
+
+[workspace.lints.rust]
+unsafe_code = "forbid"
+missing_docs = "allow"
+
+[workspace.lints.clippy]
+all = "warn"
+pedantic = "warn"
+nursery = "warn"
+too_many_arguments = "allow"
+module_name_repetitions = "allow"
+
+[profile.dev]
+opt-level = 1
+debug = true
+incremental = true
+overflow-checks = true
+
+[profile.release]
+opt-level = 3
+lto = "thin"
+codegen-units = 1
+debug = false
+panic = "abort"
+incremental = false
+
+[profile.release-service]
+inherits = "release"
+opt-level = "z"
+
+[profile.release-worker]
+inherits = "release"
+opt-level = 3
+
+[patch.crates-io]
+# Add crate patches or forks here when vendored.

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "content-extractor"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Content extraction pipeline for UltraSearch"
+
+[dependencies]
+core-types = { path = "../core-types" }
+anyhow = { workspace = true }
+extractous = { workspace = true }
+tracing = { workspace = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "content-index"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Content Tantivy index for UltraSearch"
+
+[dependencies]
+core-types = { path = "../core-types" }
+anyhow = { workspace = true }
+tantivy = { workspace = true }
+tracing = { workspace = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "core-serialization"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Shared serialization helpers for UltraSearch"
+
+[dependencies]
+core-types = { path = "../core-types" }
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+bincode = { workspace = true }
+rkyv = { workspace = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,15 @@
+[package]
+name = "core-types"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2021"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Core identifiers and shared types for UltraSearch"
+
+[dependencies]
+serde = { workspace = true, features = ["derive"] }
+bitflags = "2.4"
+anyhow = { workspace = true }
+once_cell = "1.19"
+dotenvy = "0.15"
+toml = { workspace = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,13 @@
+[package]
+name = "meta-index"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Tantivy-based filename and metadata index for UltraSearch"
+
+[dependencies]
+core-types = { path = "../core-types" }
+anyhow = { workspace = true }
+tantivy = { workspace = true }
+tracing = { workspace = true }

@@ -0,0 +1,12 @@
+[package]
+name = "semantic-index"
+version = "0.1.0"
+edition = "2024"
+publish = false
+license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
+description = "Semantic/vector index plumbing for UltraSearch (placeholder)"
+
+[dependencies]
+core-types = { path = "../core-types" }
+anyhow = { workspace = true }
+hnsw_rs = { git = "https://github.com/example/hnsw-rs.git", optional = true }
